overall.description: Static scenic view from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the Night City skyline at blue hour from a waterfront promenade. The scene features illuminated futuristic skyscrapers against a dark overcast sky, with gentle ocean waves lapping at the shore and neon signage visible on nearby buildings. The camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip, capturing the atmospheric cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlooking cyberpunk downtown skyline

events.description: flying vehicle traverses the sky from right to left above the city skyline

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on waterfront promenade, observing the city skyline and ocean

notable_agents.action: flying car moving horizontally across the sky from right to left

entered.detail: large illuminated cyan neon sign reading 'softsys' mounted on building facade
cluster of illuminated futuristic skyscrapers with various glowing windows and spires
horizontal metal safety barrier separating promenade from water
dark water with white foamy waves lapping against the shore barrier
large circular dome structure atop the building with the neon signage

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view of a cyberpunk city skyline at blue hour from a waterfront promenade. The camera overlooks the ocean with waves gently breaking against the railing, while illuminated skyscrapers and a prominent neon 'softsys' sign dominate the right side of the frame. A flying vehicle briefly crosses the sky, adding movement to the otherwise still atmospheric scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric panoramic view of a cyberpunk skyline at blue hour from a waterfront promenade. It begins with a wide gaze across the ocean, where gentle waves break against the railing in the foreground. As the eye settles on the horizon, the scene is dominated by illuminated skyscrapers and a prominent neon softsys sign glowing against the dark, overcast sky. The stillness of the cityscape is then briefly interrupted as a flying vehicle glides across the frame, adding a sense of scale and motion to the futuristic environment.
